spec_match.rationale: The page now uses appearance: base-select, demonstrates the covered multiple size>1 and size>1 listbox shapes, and labels multiple size=1 as the unsupported multi-select popup path from ChromeStatus.

interactive.rationale: Live controls switch the actual select attributes, filter options, and report selection state, but chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable for the required browser click-through pass.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: The lab covers the supported multi-select listbox, supported single-select listbox, unsupported multi-select popup shape, unsupported CSS fallback, filtering, and empty selection.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link https://chromestatus.com/feature/6222145025867776.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables, no raw hex in <style>, button overrides set background and color together, no static-card pattern.

openQuestions.title: Run the required chrome-devtools browser pass
openQuestions.detail: chrome-devtools-mcp was not exposed in this Codex session. Verify in Chrome 145+ or Canary that switching between multi-select listbox, single-select listbox, and the multiple size=1 out-of-scope popup updates the native rendering and readouts without console errors.

summary: option-template-lab now matches ChromeStatus scope: Chrome 145 covers in-flow listbox shapes via multiple or size>1 with appearance: base-select, while multiple size=1 is called out as the separate unsupported multi-select popup shape.
